english: train of thought / line of reasoning / thought process
notes: Compound noun: Gedanken (thoughts) + Gang (course/walk). Refers to a sequence or chain of thoughts or reasoning.

sentences.german: Ich kann deinem Gedankengang gut folgen.
sentences.english: I can easily follow your train of thought.

sentences.german: Der Philosoph erklärte seinen Gedankengang sehr klar.
sentences.english: The philosopher explained his line of reasoning very clearly.

sentences.german: Ihre Gedankengänge waren schwer zu verstehen.
sentences.english: Her trains of thought were difficult to understand.
